features.featureTitle: In frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, rewrite the useIsCallerAdmin query with a completely fresh approach: (1) obtain the identity directly from useInternetIdentity, (2) derive a stable principal string from the identity, (3) set enabled to true only when identity is non-null, (4) use the authenticated actor — obtained via a direct createActor call with the identity rather than relying on the cached actor — to call isCallerAdmin(), (5) include the principal string in the query key, and (6) set staleTime to 0 and gcTime to 0 so the result is never stale.

In frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx, overhaul the Admin Panel link rendering: (1) call useIsCallerAdmin and destructure its data, isLoading, and isFetching states, (2) show the Admin Panel link only when isLoggedIn is true AND isLoading is false AND isFetching is false AND the returned value is strictly true, (3) add a console.log or debug statement (to be removed later) logging the isCallerAdmin result and loading state so the issue can be diagnosed, (4) ensure the same conditional logic applies to both the desktop nav and the mobile hamburger menu.
